summary: Batch Re-evaluate All Feature (Iteration 180) - All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification successful - AI Learning page loads correctly with Re-evaluate section and button visible.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms batch re-evaluate feature is correctly implemented:

1. document_readiness_service.py lines 511-603: batch_reevaluate_all() function correctly re-evaluates ALL documents (not just new ones), detects signal contradictions, and feeds corrections into learning pipeline via evaluate_and_persist()
2. readiness.py lines 55-63: POST /reevaluate-all endpoint correctly calls batch_reevaluate_all with limit parameter
3. posting_patterns.py lines 133, 138: NoneType round() error fixed by using 'or 0' fallback for avg_invoices and total_amount/avg_lines

4. LearningDashboard.js lines 31-156: ReEvaluateSection component correctly renders with button (data-testid='reevaluate-all-btn'), results visualization including status transitions, corrections, and per-vendor breakdown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch Re-evaluate All feature fully tested. Key verifications: (1) POST /api/readiness/reevaluate-all?limit=5 returns valid structure with total_processed, total_corrections, status_transitions, vendor_corrections, by_status, errors; (2) GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-dashboard no longer throws NoneType round() error - fixed with 'or 0' fallback; (3) POST /api/readiness/evaluate/{doc_id} returns success for existing documents; (4) GET /api/readiness/metrics returns valid metrics; (5) Frontend AI Learning page at /ai-learning renders correctly with ReEvaluateSection component (data-testid='reevaluate-section') and Re-evaluate button (data-testid='reevaluate-all-btn'); (6) Learning events count > 0 confirmed (2 events from BC postings, 8 corrections learned)

frontend_ui_tests: AI Learning page loads at /ai-learning - PASS
Re-evaluate section (data-testid='reevaluate-section') found and visible - PASS
Re-evaluate button (data-testid='reevaluate-all-btn') found, visible, enabled - PASS

mocked_apis.note: All tests use real API endpoints. No mocking required.

nonetype_round_error.issue: NoneType round() error in learning-dashboard endpoint when avg_invoices or total_amount/avg_lines is None
nonetype_round_error.fix: posting_patterns.py lines 133, 138 now use 'or 0' fallback: round(p.get('avg_invoices') or 0, 1) and round(v.get('total_amount') or 0, 2), round(v.get('avg_lines') or 0, 1)

batch_reevaluate_feature.issue: Need batch re-evaluate feature where EVERY correction is learned and applied
batch_reevaluate_feature.fix: batch_reevaluate_all() service function re-evaluates ALL documents using learning-aware evaluate_and_persist(), POST /api/readiness/reevaluate-all endpoint, ReEvaluateSection component on AI Learning page
